title: Red White Tinsel for Christmas Tree, Candy Cane Tinsel Garland for Xmas Tree Decorations, Ceiling Hanging, New Year, Birthday, Holiday Indoor Outdoor Party Supplies
features: Captivate with Festive Charm: Elevate your holiday décor with our enchanting spiral Christmas ornaments. Crafted from durable metal wire, these ornaments feature vibrant red candy cane sticks adorned with classic white stripes, perfect for enhancing your Christmas tree and spreading festive spirit throughout your home.

Unique Candy Design: Designed from top to bottom, our ornaments showcase a playful yet sophisticated candy cane pattern. The seamless blend of candy cane and metal wire adds depth and dimension to your decorations, making them a standout feature of your holiday display.

Built to Last: Rest assured, our ornaments are crafted for longevity. The sturdy metal wire frame ensures durability, while the candy cane tinsel garland accents are built to withstand the season's festivities, promising years of cherished holiday memories.
Easy to Hang and Remove: The lightweight design and sturdy construction make it easy to hang and remove our tinsel garlands, saving you time and effort during holiday decorations.

Versatile Use: With a classic color , our ornaments are designed to be the centerpiece of your holiday decorations. Their striking hues pop against any backdrop, making them ideal for decorating christmas tree,mantels,stairs, windowsills, or adding a charming touch to your gift wrapping.
description: Product description Deck the halls with this festive Christmas Candy Cane Tinsel Garland, spanning an impressive 10 metres (32.8 feet) in length. Crafted from shimmering metallic twists, this garland adds a touch of whimsy and sparkle to your holiday decor. Drape it elegantly around your Christmas tree, wind it along banisters or mantelpieces, or create a stunning ceiling display for your New Year's Eve party. Its versatility extends beyond the festive season, making it a delightful addition to birthdays, anniversary celebrations, or any joyous occasion. Lightweight and easy to manipulate, this garland is suitable for both indoor and outdoor use, ensuring your celebrations are infused with festive cheer wherever they may be. Embrace the magic of the season and let this Candy Cane Tinsel Garland add a touch of enchantment to your home or event. Safety Warning Keep away from heat sources and open flames. Do not use with electrical lights. Not suitable for children under 3 years due to small parts.
